title: Luleå, Norrbotten — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Luleå, Norrbotten: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Luleå is a city in Norrbotten with a population of 79,000. A northern coastal city in the Arctic region, known for its steel industry, icebreaker tours, and midnight sun.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
